creator: nakaji@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
I approve the patch. Thanks.

>>>>> In <20070605070017.37BD916A4DE@hub.freebsd.org> 
>>>>>	Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.ORG> wrote:
> Maintainer of japanese/emacs-emcws,

> Please note that PR ports/113355 has just been submitted.

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/113355

> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis

NAKAJI Hiroyuki
